summary_text: 残タスクは完了しました。 Kernel 合議で最後に潰したのは3点です。`bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh` は attachable run 判定を artifact 生成前に前倒しし、`kernel-runtime-health.sh status-json` を使うようにして text parse 依存を消しました。[bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L59](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L59) [bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L164](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L164) [kernel-runtime-health.sh#L22](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L22) [kernel-runtime-health.sh#L246](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh#L246) さらに compact artifact は `KERNEL_PHASE_ARTIFACTS_DROP_KEYS` で stale key を削除できるようにし、research-only attach 時に古い `implementation_report_path` を確実に消すようにしました。[kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L348](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L348) [kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L412](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L412) [bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L382](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L382) あわせて social-post は quote なしでは `implement`/`verify` を通れない gate を維持し、その回帰を揃えました。[kernel-phase-gate.sh#L225](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh#L225) [kernel-phase-gate.sh#L287](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-phase-gate.sh#L287) [test-kernel-phase-gate.sh#L149](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh#L149) blocked run では pre-implement artifact が作られないこと、stale implementation path が消えること、health JSON が使えることもテストで固定しました。[test-bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L129](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L129) [test-bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L223](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh#L223) [test-kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L65](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-compact-artifact.sh#L65) [test-kernel-runtime-health.sh#L67](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-runtime-health.sh#L67) 検証は通っています。`bash tests/test-kernel-compact-artifact.sh`、`bash tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh`、`bash tests/test-kernel-runtime-health.sh`、`bash tests/test-bootstrap-kernel-social-artifacts.sh`、`bash tests/test-codex-kernel-guard-attach-context.sh`、`bash tests/test-kernel-handoff-summary.sh`、`bash tests/test-social-context-reference.sh`。 この flow については、実装側の残タスクはありません。残るのは運用上の注意だけで、`kernel-phase-gate` を経由しない手動 compact 編集までは防げない、という低い残余リスクです。
